booking.anyAvailableHint: Whoever is free at your chosen time.
booking.noSlots: No slots available for this day. Try another date.
booking.policy: By confirming, you agree to our cancellation policy: please cancel at least {hours} hours before your appointment.
booking.policyNoShow: A no-show fee may apply for missed appointments.
booking.confirmationDescription: We've reserved your appointment. A confirmation will be sent to {email}.

manage.title: Your appointment
manage.alreadyCompleted: This appointment has been completed. Hope to see you again.
manage.inThePast: This appointment is in the past.
manage.outsideWindow: Cancellations must be made at least {hours} hours in advance. To cancel within this window, please contact {tenant}{contact}.
manage.linkExpiredDescription: This management link is invalid or has expired. Please contact the shop.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel appointment?
cancelDialog.description: You can re-book any time. If you paid in advance, the shop will refund you separately.

success.descriptionPaid: Your appointment is confirmed. We've emailed you a receipt.
success.descriptionPending: Your payment is processing. We'll email you as soon as it's confirmed.

confirmation.heading: Your booking is confirmed
confirmation.icsNote: The attached calendar invite will add this appointment to your phone.
confirmation.manageCta: Need to cancel or reschedule? Manage your booking.

reminder.heading: Your appointment is coming up
reminder.intro: This is a friendly reminder of your appointment at {tenant}.
reminder.manageCta: Need to cancel or reschedule? Manage your booking.

sms.reminder: Hi {firstName}, reminder of your {service} appointment at {tenant}{withStaff} on {when}. Manage: {link}
